creator: jimmy@mammothcheese.ca
text:
New distfile.  New diff.  By gosh this is the last one, or I'll
marry a monkey and go live in the jungle.

diff -ruN /usr/ports/lang/munger/Makefile ./munger/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/lang/munger/Makefile	Sun May 27 18:30:30 2007
+++ ./munger/Makefile	Mon May 28 13:05:47 2007
@@ -2,11 +2,11 @@
  # Date created:                       Thu, 03 Jul 2003 20:05:06 EDT
  # Whom:                               James Bailie 
<jimmy@mammothcheese.ca>
  #
-# $FreeBSD: ports/lang/munger/Makefile,v 1.55 2007/05/27 22:30:30 miwi 
Exp $
+# $FreeBSD: ports/lang/munger/Makefile,v 1.54 2007/05/27 15:34:34 miwi 
Exp $
  #

  PORTNAME=	munger
-PORTVERSION=	4.133
+PORTVERSION=	4.134
  CATEGORIES=	lang
  MASTER_SITES=	http://www.mammothcheese.ca/

diff -ruN /usr/ports/lang/munger/distinfo ./munger/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/lang/munger/distinfo	Sun May 27 18:30:30 2007
+++ ./munger/distinfo	Mon Jun  4 01:06:14 2007
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (munger-4.133.tar.gz) = 32da41d83c4e82a42264fe9ed4bc41df
-SHA256 (munger-4.133.tar.gz) = 
cebfcd2ce2a370dc1d97beb66885cd945ce2a52fb4dea93f248503556b37a700
-SIZE (munger-4.133.tar.gz) = 316929
+MD5 (munger-4.134.tar.gz) = 01807612b9d788034bb0cbd84486a5f8
+SHA256 (munger-4.134.tar.gz) = 
cb3aff2d7125ba7cbb9ae1b3312b102aeecd1ad0a9bc9b82b87bb25e666977d1
+SIZE (munger-4.134.tar.gz) = 317156
diff -ruN /usr/ports/lang/munger/pkg-plist ./munger/pkg-plist
--- /usr/ports/lang/munger/pkg-plist	Sun May 27 18:30:30 2007
+++ ./munger/pkg-plist	Mon May 28 13:05:50 2007
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
  bin/munger
-lib/libmunger.so.26
+lib/libmunger.so.27
  %%DKNS_BIN%%
  %%DATADIR%%/ipdatabase.munger
  %%DATADIR%%/httpd.munger
